why_belief_over_hybrid_light: belief uses observed target semantic history / uncertainty and trace-conditioned unit/semantic consistency; final belief reports supersede hybrid_light as official source-of-truth.
why_belief_over_residual_gallery: clean_residual_v2 and trace_gallery_assoc are useful diagnostics but their decision reports do not support the official story as strongly as trace_belief_assoc.
why_frozen_external_teacher_only_not_off: it is a clean external teacher baseline without TUSB trace-unit state, while official STWM uses trace-conditioned semantic belief plus unit and coord plausibility.
why_not_teacher_only_retrieval: tusb_semantic_target is trace-conditioned; trace_belief_assoc combines observed belief, semantic trace evidence, unit identity consistency, and motion plausibility rather than pure teacher crop retrieval.
